kirundi.try_all_3_scale_views: Gerageza uburyo bwose 3 bwo kuraba ingano
kirundi.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Kugendera hamwe — hafi 0.3 kg CO₂ kuri buri munyeshure kuri buri rugendo.
kirundi.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Imbuto, imboga, imyaka, ibishimbo — ikirenge c'ibiryo gito kurusha ibindi.
kirundi.compost_recycle: Guhindura ifumbire no gukoresha bundi bushasha
kirundi.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Gukoresha bundi bushasha bizigama ~1 tone CO₂ kuri buri tone y'ibikoresho.
kirundi.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Indege ifite ingaruka yo gushuha 2-3× kurenza CO₂ yonyine.
kirundi.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Urugendo rumwe rurerure rwo kuja no kugaruka = ~3 tone — umwaka wose wo gutwara ku bantu benshi.
kirundi.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e kuri buri kg y'inyama y'inka — hejuru kuruta ibiribwa vyose.
kirundi.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Ibishimbo + umuceri + imboga = ikirenge gito gishoboka.
kirundi.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Ibikombe vyo guta vyongeraho ~50% ugereranyije n'icakorewe mu rugo.
kirundi.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gaze karemano: ~2 kg/therm. Igihe c'itumba gusa.
kirundi.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Raporo ya Netflix 2023 — munsi y'ibigereranyo vya kera.
kirundi.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e kuri buri prompt y'inyandiko. Ibibazo vy'imvugo ndende (1M token) bihenda ~3× kurushaho.
kirundi.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g kuri buri clip. Vyiyongera ku murongo hamwe n'uburebure bwa clip + resolution. Biremereye 50×+ kuruta inyandiko.
kirundi.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Bika telefoni imyaka 3+ kugira ngo ugabanye ingaruka y'umwaka kimwe ca kabiri.
kirundi.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Kohereza mu minsi 2 = 3× vyo kohereza gahoro.
kirundi.negative_recycling_avoids_emissions: Nibi! Gukoresha bundi bushasha birinda isohoka.
kirundi.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Birinda methane KANDI vyubaka karubone yo mu butaka.
kirundi.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Amazi yo mu mubombo = asukuye ~500× ku bijanye n'isohoka.
kirundi.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Ico buri muntu akeneye kugeraho mu 2030 kugira ngo agume munsi ya 1.5°C.
kirundi.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Imiji nka Burlington, Vermont isanzwe ikoresha amashanyarazi ashobora kuvugururwa 100%!
kirundi.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Danemarke isanzwe ibona 55% vy'amashanyarazi yayo mu muyaga.
kirundi.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Isi yongeraho ingufu zishobora kuvugururwa vuba kurusha ikindi gihe cose.
kirundi.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Bihamye imyaka 10,000. Ikirere ca Holocène aho umuco wose w'abantu wakuriye.
kirundi.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling atangura gukurikirana CO₂ ku buryo buhoraho i Mauna Loa. Umurongo we wagaragaje ko ubushuhe buterwa n'abantu ari ukuri.
kirundi.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Umuhanga w'ikirere James Hansen abwira Kongere ya Amerika ko ubushuhe bwatangiye. 350.org ifata 350 ppm nk'urubibi “rutekanye”.
kirundi.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Ubwa mbere CO₂ yo mu kirere yarengeje 400 ppm mu myaka miliyoni 3+. Igihe ca nyuma ca 400 ppm c'Isi: amashamba y'ubushuhe ku mpera z'isi.
kirundi.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Urwego rwa none. Rwo hejuru cane mu vyibura imyaka 800,000 (biva mu bikonje). Bingana na ~1.2°C vy'ubushuhe.
kirundi.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Urubibi rufitanye isano n'ubushuhe bwa 2°C nibibandanya. Intego y'Amasezerano ya Paris: kuguma munsi ya 1.5°C.
kirundi.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Ibintu vyinshi vyo kwera kwa korali vyakubise Great Barrier Reef mu 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, na 2024. Ku bushuhe bwa 1.5°C, 70–90% vy'amabuye ya korali y'ubushuhe arapfa. Kuri 2°C, 99% arapfa.
kirundi.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Urubura rwa Greenland rufite amazi ahagije yo kuzamura urwego rw'inyanja metero 7 (23 ft). Ku ~1.5°C bikomeje, gushonga bihinduka ikitagaruka mu binyejana kugeza ku bihumbi vy'imyaka.
kirundi.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Uruziga rwa AMOC rutwara ubushuhe ruva mu turere dushushe rukaja Uburayi. Rwagabanutse 15% kuva 1950. Guhagarara burundu vyakonjesha Uburayi bw'amajaruguru cane bikanabangamira imvura ya monsoon muri Afurika na Aziya.
kirundi.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon itanga kimwe ca kabiri c'imvura yayo. Hamwe no gutema amashamba 20–25% + ubushuhe buzamuka, ifite ivyago vyo guhinduka iva ku ishamba ry'imvura ikaja ku isambu. Ubushakashatsi bumwe bwerekana ko urubibi rwegereye 2°C ku gipimo co gutema c'ubu.
kirundi.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Permafrost ya Arctique ifite karubone incuro ebyiri z'iri mu kirere ubu. Ishuha 3–4× vuba kuruta impuzandengo y'isi, isanzwe irashonga ikanasohora CO₂ na methane (bikomeye 28× kuruta CO₂ mu myaka 100).
kirundi.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Urubura rushingiye ku nyanja rwakomejwe munsi y'urwego rw'inyanja. Amazi ashushe y'inyanja arayarigata avuye hasi. Urubura rwa Thwaites (“Doomsday Glacier”) ni co cago nyamukuru. Guhirima bizazamura urwego rw'inyanja metero 3.3 (11 ft).
kirundi.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Amashamba y'amajaruguru y'ibihuru (Uburusiya, Kanada, Scandinavia) ari mu mihangayiko iterwa n'ubushuhe, udukoko tw'ibishishwa, n'inkongi z'amashamba. Guhinduka burundu bikaba ubwatsi bishobora gusohora karubone nyinshi cane yabitswe.
kirundi.gulf_of_maine_rapid_warming: Ubushuhe Bwihuse bwa Gulf of Maine
kirundi.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine yashushe vuba kuruta 99% vy'inyanja z'isi kuva 1980 — hafi 0.5°F kuri buri myaka icumi, hafi 3× impuzandengo y'inyanja ku isi. Umuyaga ukonje wa Labrador wagabanutse mu gihe amazi ashushe ya Gulf Stream ageze mu majaruguru cane, ari kuvugurura urusobe rw'ibiribwa mu gihe nyaco kuva ku shingiro. Imiryango yo ku nkombe ya Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, na Mi’kmaq bari barandika iyi mihindagurikire mu nyandiko z'akanwa mu myaka mirongo mbere y'uko satelite zivyemeza.
kirundi.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Amashanyarazi ahenze gake mu mateka. Guhuza urusobe ni co kibazo nyamukuru ubu.
kirundi.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Vyatataniye + bikomeye. Kugarura amafaranga ya sisitemu isanzwe ya 5kW: imyaka 6–10.
kirundi.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 vy'ibiryo birapfa ubusa. Kubuza gutakaza birinda methane iva mu irunda KANDI isohoka ryo guhinga ibiryo.
kirundi.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Ntabwo ari 100% vegan — no kugabanya inyama y'inka 3× mu cumweru bifite ingaruka nini. Birekura ubutaka bwo kongera guteramo amashamba.
kirundi.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Tera aho imiterere karemano ishigikira ikura. Inyungu z'inyongera: gukonjesha, kurinda ikigega c'amazi.
kirundi.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: Kutarima + imyaka ipfuka + kuzunguruka bitandukanye. Vyubaka karubone yo mu butaka mu gihe bibungabunga umusaruro.
kirundi.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Ubutaka bwa peat bubika karubone 3× kuruta amashamba ku isi. Peat yumye = usohora munini.
kirundi.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Gari za moshi z'amashanyarazi zitwara umugenzi-km ku 1/10 vy'isohoka ry'imodoka.
kirundi.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Imiji y'amagare y'Ubuholandi ifite 1/3 vy'isohoka ry'ubwikorezi. Ibikorwa remezo bishinga imyitwarire.
kirundi.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Isolation + pompe z'ubushuhe + amatara ya LED. Amazu ya Amerika akoresha 40% vy'ingufu z'ibanze.
kirundi.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Buri gihe ku isonga. Abagore bize bafite abana bake KANDI ubuzima bufite ingaruka nini. Vyiyongera mu bisekuru.
kirundi.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Bisimbura umuriro w'inkwi/amakara. Inyungu: ikirere + ihumana ry'umwuka wo mu nzu (rwica 4M/umwaka) + gutema amashamba.
kirundi.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Ikura 60× vuba kuruta ibiti vyo ku butaka. Ibika CO₂ + isubiza uburovyi + ifumbire.
kirundi.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Isohoka Rike Cane — Rihuye na Paris
kirundi.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Genda n'amaguru, ku igare, canke kuri bisi uja ku ishure
kirundi.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Gerageza ifunguro rimwe ridafite inyama mu cumweru
kirundi.talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Vugana n'umuryango wawe ku mahitamwo y'ingufu
kirundi.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Tera igiti canke tangura ubusitani bw'ishure
kirundi.start_a_recycling_program_at_school: Tangura gahunda yo gukoresha bundi bushasha ku ishure
kirundi.hero_ppm: CO₂ uyu munsi: ~424 ppm — hejuru cane mu myaka irenga miliyoni 3
kirundi.mission_panel_copy: Va ku makuru bwite uje ku bimenyetso vy'isi, ubutabera, n'ibisubizo. Laboratwari za politike n'iza guhatira zo mu rwego rwo hejuru zigumaho iyo uzagura.
kirundi.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Urugo rusanzwe rwa Amerika rusohora ~16 tone CO₂/umwaka. Ibikoresho binini ni ugushusha urugo, ubwikorezi, n'imirire — atari sipoma za plastike.
kirundi.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Izuba + umuyaga ubu bihenze gake kuruta inganda nshasha z'ibinyabutabire mu masoko menshi. Igice kigoye ni uguhuza urusobe, atari igiciro co gukora.
kirundi.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Gupima CO₂ ku buryo buhoraho i Mauna Loa kuva 1958 — inyandiko y'ikirere imaze igihe kirekire. Ishusho y'amenyo y'umusumeno iva mu photosynthèse y'Uruhande rwo mu majaruguru rw'isi.
kirundi.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Imbibi aho sisitemu ihindura imiterere igasigara ari yo — gushonga kwa Greenland, kugabanuka kwa Amazon, kugabanuka kwa AMOC. Ubushakashatsi bushasha bwerekana ko zimwe zishobora kuba hafi kuruta uko vyatekerezwaga.
kirundi.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Ibihugu vyasohoye gake bihura n'ingaruka mbi kurusha ibindi. Ikirere ni ikibazo c'uburinganire mbere ya vyose — kwibasirwa bikurikira amafaranga, geografiya, n'inshingano z'amateka.
kirundi.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown ishira ibisubizo 100 ku rutonde ku gigatoni za CO₂ zirinzwe. Ibikonjesha, gutakaza ibiryo, no kwigisha abakobwa biri ku isonga — atari ivyo abantu benshi biyumvira.
kirundi.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Kwerekana ishusho ya donut y'ikirenge ca karubone ya Climate Explorer ihuza
kirundi.annual_global_co2_emission_rate: Igipimo c'isohoka rya CO2 ku isi buri mwaka
kirundi.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Bipfundikiye ku ~1.5°C vy'ubushuhe bukomeje. Ubwinshi bwo kwitoza ku nkombe biracashoboka hifashishijwe inkuta z'inyanja, kwisubiraho biyobowe.
kirundi.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Bifitanye isano na ~2.5°C vy'ubushuhe. Vyimura abantu benshi kuruta intambara iyo ari yo yose mu mateka. Umuraba w'inkubi w'inyanja uba ikiza ku turere two mu gihugu.
kirundi.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Bishoboka mu 2300 kuri 3°C. Amahanga yose atakaza ubutaka bwo gutuura. New Orleans, Venise, n'igice kinini ca Vietnam.
kirundi.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Ubwiyemezo bw'ibinyejana vyinshi ku bushuhe bwa 4°C. Bisaba guhirima kwa Greenland + Antarctique y'Uburengerazuba. Geografiya y'inkombe y'umuco w'abantu yandikwa bundi bushasha burundu.
kirundi.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Bipfundikiye na Greenland + igice kinini ca Antarctique y'Uburengerazuba vyabuze. Inkombe ishushe kuruta iya gihe ca Pliocène. Ibinyejana kugeza ku bihumbi vy'imyaka kugira ngo bisohore burundu.
kirundi.cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — icitonderwa: ~25% vya CO₂ yose y'amateka
kirundi.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Sunika isezerano ry'Ikigega c'Igihombo n'Ivyangiritse ryiyongere
kirundi.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS itanga iciyumviro c'Igihombo n'Ivyangiritse muri COP1 Berlin
kirundi.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC itangura gukurikirana ukwimuka guterwa n'ikirere
kirundi.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Icemezo ca UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand
kirundi.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — Ikigega ca L&D cashizweho
kirundi.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubai — Ikigega ca L&D cahawe imari
kirundi.first_l_d_fund_disbursements: Ubwishu bwa mbere bw'Ikigega ca L&D
kirundi.pick_the_biggest_impact_solution: Toranya igisubizo gifite ingaruka nini kurusha ibindi
kirundi.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Nta gikorwa kinini ca politiki canke c'ikirere. Akazi gasanzwe ka politike gakomeje.
kirundi.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Wageze ku ivanwaho ry'imbitse rya karubone mu nzego zose, wubatse ubukomeye, kandi ushira uburinganire hagati. Uku ni ko impinduka y'ikirere yatsinze igaragara iyo amasezerano y'imibereho abandanya.
kirundi.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Ivanwaho rikomeye rya karubone mu nzego z'ingufu n'ubwikorezi, ariko kwitoza n'ubutabera vyasigaye inyuma. Imirongo ya karubone ni myiza; ihuriro rya politiki ni ridakomeye.
kirundi.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Ivanwaho rya karubone ryahagaze. Icuho co kwitoza cagutse. Inkunga y'abaturage yaguye. Iyi ni yo nzira dukora kugira ngo twirinde: ingaruka z'ikirere zikusanya nta bikorwa remezo vy'imibereho canke ikoranabuhanga vyo gusubiza.
kirundi.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Imiterere y'ibanze irashoboka. Saranganya ishoramari mu nzego 2-3 mu gihe ca mbere kugira ngo umenye amategeko ya feedback afata mbere. Uburezi bw'abaturage + inteko z'abaturage bitanga inyungu buhoro ariko biramvye.
kirundi.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Feedback nziza iratsinda; Isi ishuha yerekeza ku iringaniza rishushe kurushaho. (Icuzi-shushe “kitagenzurwa” nyakuri — inyanja zisiba zigahinduka umwuka — ni ibihe vya Venus, atari Isi kuri iyi mihatire.)
kirundi.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Albedo iri hejuru + feedback mbi. Inzira y'igihe c'urubura.
kirundi.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Igishushanyo c'iringaniza ry'ingufu: urumuri rw'izuba rw'umuraba mugufi runyura mu rwego rwa gaze z'ikirere rugashusha ubuso; ubuso busohora infrared, iyo urwego rwa gaze rufata igice rukayisohora bundi bushasha hasi, rugafata ubushuhe.
kirundi.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Iciyumviro: Ni ryari albedo itsinda guhatira kwa GHG?
kirundi.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Sigura uko albedo, feedback y'ibicu, na GHGs bitwara imiterere y'ikirere hamwe.
